title: オペレーション『気分転換』

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Confirming solo arrival at aquarium. Commencing
operation—"change of pace."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourbon! You here by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My trainer had some business to attend to,
so I was instructed to enjoy a "change of pace" by
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, I obtained data suggesting
that visiting an aquarium is an effective way to
relax and brighten one's mood.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How about hanging out with me for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez was supposed to come too, but she's still
stuck in a meeting at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have seen data showing that socializing with
multiple people can double the mood-changing
effects. Let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Awesome! Okay, first off, let's start with the
aquarium's crown jewel—the dolphin show!
Splaaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Oh! This dolphin's movements are...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon, you feelin' okay? You've had your head
in the clouds half the time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I recalled a memory about a certain thing my
father once told me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"A dolphin's movements are matched perfectly to
its surroundings. The driving force of those fins
could be a hint to improving your running."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That's the kind of stuff you two talked
about at aquariums? Talk about quirky.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But then again, I kinda get it. Prez is always trying
to come up with all sorts of quirky quips.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll be like, "Let's go see the dolphin show," and she'll be all like, "I hope we get there before it finishes."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Everyone enjoys things in their own way, so it's all
good! That's how we have fun around here!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. That will become a precious memory, as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have successfully elated my mood and cleared
my mind. I will now return to Trainer with my
report.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go back and see Prez too! Let's book it
back to the academy! ♪

After gaining some insight during her break,
Mihono Bourbon improves her running skills!
